title: Worldbuilders alpha-tester application
description: Form schema for the pre-launch alpha-tester application. Backs the /alpha page applicant form. Persisted into wb.applicants. Per Q243.

name.title: Display name
name.description: Name or handle we should address you by. Real name not required.

email.title: Email
email.description: Where we send the invite code. We never resell or share this.

country.title: Country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)
country.description: Used to balance regional diversity across waves. Global programme — every country welcome.

parental_consent.title: Parental/guardian consent (required if 13-17)
parental_consent.description: Roblox COPPA requirement; a parent or guardian must agree to the alpha terms for under-18 applicants.

primary_device.title: Primary device for testing
primary_device.description: We allocate seats across the device matrix so we surface device-specific bugs.

roblox_username.title: Roblox username
roblox_username.description: Used to allowlist your UserId for verbose telemetry (per Q188) and to grant the Founder badge.

willing_to_record_video.title: Willing to record short screen-capture clips (optional)

consent_pre_launch_emails.title: I agree to receive pre-launch emails about Worldbuilders

consent_nda_required_on_invite.title: I understand a Stage-1 invite requires signing an NDA
consent_nda_required_on_invite.description: Stage-2 and Stage-3 invites carry a soft or no NDA respectively.

referral_source.title: How did you hear about us? (optional)
